headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: May 12, 2026**
article:
The Cleveland Guardians dominated the Los Angeles Angels 7-2, with Joey Cantillo pitching 6.0 innings of shutout baseball. In other action, the Baltimore Orioles edged out the New York Yankees 3-2, and the Tampa Bay Rays took down the Toronto Blue Jays 8-5.

Several key players are dealing with injuries, including Athletics shortstop Jacob Wilson, who has been placed on the 10-day injured list due to a left shoulder dislocation. The New York Yankees have also placed shortstop José Caballero on the 10-day injured list with a right middle finger fracture. Other teams have also suffered injuries, including the Atlanta Braves, Toronto Blue Jays, Detroit Tigers, and Los Angeles Dodgers.

The Arizona Diamondbacks made a key trade, acquiring outfielder Jose Requena from the Los Angeles Dodgers in exchange for center fielder Alek Thomas. The San Francisco Giants traded catcher Patrick Bailey to the Cleveland Guardians for left-hander Matt Wilkinson and other considerations. The Baltimore Orioles also made a trade, acquiring right-hander Enyel Garcia and right-hander Maicol Lauriano from the Philadelphia Phillies for cash.

top_news.title: **Guardians Shut Down Angels in Dominant Performance**
top_news.summary: The Cleveland Guardians secured a 7-2 victory over the Los Angeles Angels, with Joey Cantillo leading the way on the mound. Cantillo pitched 6.0 innings, striking out 4 batters and allowing 0 earned runs.

top_news.title: **Yankees Fall to Orioles in Thrilling Finish**
top_news.summary: The Baltimore Orioles edged out the New York Yankees 3-2, securing a crucial win. Coby Mayo led the Orioles' offense with a home run and three RBIs.

top_news.title: **Rays Take Down Blue Jays 8-5**
top_news.summary: The Tampa Bay Rays secured an 8-5 victory over the Toronto Blue Jays, with Andrés Giménez leading the charge at the plate. Giménez hit two home runs and drove in five runs, while Bryan Baker earned the save with a scoreless inning of relief.

top_news.title: **Diamondbacks Take Down Rangers in Low-Scoring Affair**
top_news.summary: The Arizona Diamondbacks secured a 1-0 victory over the Texas Rangers, with Michael Soroka earning the win after pitching 6.1 innings with 5 strikeouts and no earned runs. Geraldo Perdomo led the Diamondbacks' offense with 2 hits, 1 RBI, and a key double that scored the game's only run.

top_news.title: **Athletics Place Jacob Wilson on 10-Day Injured List**
top_news.summary: Athletics shortstop Jacob Wilson has been placed on the 10-day injured list due to a left shoulder dislocation. The move is retroactive to May 11, 2026.

top_news.title: **Diamondbacks Acquire Requena in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Arizona Diamondbacks have acquired outfielder Jose Requena in a trade with the Los Angeles Dodgers. Requena joins the Diamondbacks in exchange for center fielder Alek Thomas.
